content: I saw Anjali walking with a man around 10:20 PM. I was on my balcony, sipping tea. I recognized the man — he’s a neighbor, works at the gym. He was wearing a blue jacket. They were talking calmly. I thought they were going to the café together. I didn’t think anything was wrong. I didn’t see any struggle. I didn’t call the police because I thought it was consensual. I didn’t know about the assault until the next morning. I didn’t see the man’s face clearly — just the jacket. I have a migraine, so I don’t remember exact details. But I’m sure it was a man she knew.
